title: Neural Network Pairing
description: Find two numbers that sum to a target in an array
story: The neural network's firewall requires a specific pair of access codes. You've intercepted the possible codes but need to find the two that combine to breach the system.
mission: Identify the two access codes that sum to the breach target.
input_spec:
First line: space-separated integers
Second line: target sum
output_spec: Indices of the two numbers (space-separated) or 'no solution'

hints.content: Use a hashmap to store seen numbers
For each number, check if target - number exists
